response.text:
## 📋 8 measurement Commands Found

---

### **1. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:JITTERSummary:EYEWIDTHBER**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries whether EyeWidth@BER is included in the jitter summ

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries whether EyeWidth@BER is included in the jitter summary for the measurement. Measurements are specified by x.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:JITTERSummary:EYEWIDTHBER <NR1>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **2. MEASUrement:ADDMEAS**

**📋 Description:** This command adds a measurement.



**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS {ACCOMMONMODE|ACPR|ACRMS|AMPLITUDE|AREA|BASE|BITAMPLITUDE| BITHIGH|BITLOW|BURSTWIDTH|CCJITTER|COMMONMODE|CPOWER|DATARATE|DCD|DDJ|DDRAOS| DDRAOSPERTCK|DDRAOSPERUI|DDRAUS|DDRAUSPERTCK|DDRAUSPERUI|DDRHOLDDIFF|DDRSETUPDIFF| DDRTCHABS|DDRTCHAVERAGE|DDRTCKAVERAGE|DDRTCLABS|DDRTCLAVERAGE|DDRTERRMN|DDRTERRN| DDRTJITCC|DDRTJITDUTY|DDRTJITPER|DDRTPST|DDRTRPRE|DDRTWPRE|DDRVIXAC|DDRTDQSCK| DELAY|DJ|DJDIRAC|DPMPSIJ|EYEHIGH|EYELOW|FALLSLEWRATE|FALLTIME|FREQUENCY|F2|F4|F8| HEIGHT|HEIGHTBER|HIGH|HIGHTIME|HOLD|IMDAANGLE|IMDADIRECTION|IMDADQ0|IMDAEFFICIENCY| IMDAHARMONICS|IMDAMECHPWR|IMDAPOWERQUALITY|IMDASPEED|IMDASYSEFF|IMDATORQUE|ISI| JITTERSUMMARY|J2|J9|LOW|LOWTIME|MAXIMUM|MEAN|MINIMUM|NDUty|NOVERSHOOT|NPERIOD| NPJ|NWIDTH|OBW|PATTERNLENGTH|PDUTY|PERIOD|PHASE|PHASENOISE|PJ|PK2Pk|POVERSHOOT| PWIDTH|QFACTOR|RISESLEWRATE|RISETIME|RJ|RJDIRAC|RMS|SETUP|SKEW|SRJ|SSCFREQDEV| SSCMODRATE|SSCSLEWRATE|TIE|TIMEOUTSIDELEVEL|TIMETOMAX|TIMETOMIN|TJBER|TNTRATIO|TOP| UNITINTERVAL|VDIFFXOVR|WBGDDT|WBGDIODEDDT|WBGEOFF|WBGEON|WBGERR|WBGIPEAK|WBGIRRM| WBGQOSS|WBGQRR|WBGTDOFF|WBGTDON|WBGTF|WBGTON|WBGTOFF|WBGTR|WBGTRR|WBGTDT|WBGVPEAK| WIDTH|WIDTHBER}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **3. MEASUrement:ADDNew**

**📋 Description:** This command adds the specified measurement.



**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:ADDNew  <QString>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **4. CUSTOMTABle:ADDNew**

**📋 Description:** This command adds new custom results table.



**⚙️ Syntax:** `CUSTOMTABle:ADDNew  <QString>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **5. MEASTABle:ADDNew**

**📋 Description:** This command adds a new measurement results view table to the scope application.

**📖 Details:** This command adds a new measurement results view table to the scope application. The results view table can be named through the argument sent to the command.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASTABle:ADDNew  <QString>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **6. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:AMEThod**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the analysis method used to compute eye width or ey

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the analysis method used to compute eye width or eye height.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:AMEThod  {PARAmetric|HISTogram}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **7. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TLEVel**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries whether histogram center is percentage relative to

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries whether histogram center is percentage relative to unit amplitude or an absolute value, for eye height measurement.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TLEVel  {PERCent|ABSolute}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **8. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:VLEVel**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries whether histogram center is percentage relative to

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries whether histogram center is percentage relative to unit interval or an absolute value for eye width measurement.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:VLEVel  {PERCent|ABSolute}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7

---
